notes: Auto-generated from OR live catalog. Claude/Gemini/GPT/o families are exhaustively expanded with backend prefix variants (anthropic/bedrock/vertex for Claude, google/vertex for Gemini, openai for GPT) and -max suffix variants for thinking-capable models. Bare model name = adaptive thinking. -max suffix = forced maximum thinking budget. Non-listed OR models pass through untouched (no registry entry needed).
